Hey {{ $('Cal.com Trigger').item.json.attendees[0].name }},

Your discovery call with Digitalise Agency is confirmed for {{ $('Cal.com Trigger').item.json.startTime.toDateTime().format('dd/MM/yyyy') }} AT {{ $('Cal.com Trigger').item.json.startTime.toDateTime().format('hh:mm a') }}.

This session will be hosted via Google Meet. To join the call, click the following link at your scheduled time: {{ $('Cal.com Trigger').item.json.metadata.videoCallUrl }}

During the call, we will:

  • Gain clarity on your current business position and growth objectives.
  • Evaluate how our AI-Powered SEO Blog Funnel can specifically support your goals.
  • Discuss potential enrollment into our services if we both agree it's the right fit.

If you have any questions beforehand, simply reply to this email — we're here to help.

Looking forward to our conversation.

Best regards,
Salman,
CEO,
Digitalise Agency

parameters.content:
# 📅 Cal.com Booking Automation Workflow

## Purpose
Automated CRM and communication system that captures Cal.com bookings, stores them in Google Sheets, and sends multi-stage SMS follow-ups to attendees.

## Prerequisites
✓ Cal.com API credentials (configured for event type ID: 2926528)
✓ Google Sheets API access (CRM spreadsheet: "The Sales Agent - CRM")
✓ Twilio account with SMS capabilities (phone: YOUR_TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER)

## Execution Triggers
1. **Real-time**: Automatically fires when a booking is created in Cal.com
2. **Scheduled**: Runs every 10 minutes to check for upcoming calls and send reminders

## Workflow Overview
- **Path 1 (Booking Created)**: Cal.com trigger → Validation → Google Sheets → Confirmation SMS → Update tracking
- **Path 2 (Scheduled Reminders)**: Schedule trigger → Fetch bookings → Time-based conditions → Send reminder SMS → Update tracking

## Expected Outputs
✓ Contact details added/updated in Google Sheets CRM
✓ SMS confirmation sent to attendee upon booking
✓ Follow-up SMS 24 hours before call
✓ Reminder SMS 5 minutes before call
✓ Tracking flags (F1-F4) updated in CRM
